name: Aarav Sharma
review: Staying at Saraswati Niwas has been a fantastic experience. The high-speed internet is perfect for my exam prep, and the food feels just like home. The security staff is very polite and always on alert.

name: Ananya Patel
review: The girls' security and management here are top-notch. It is close to the metro station, which is super convenient for my daily commute. The rooms are clean, spacious, and very modern.

name: Rahul Verma
review: As an IIMT student, the location couldn't be better. The gym facilities are excellent, and the dining area is a great place to hang out with friends. Worth every rupee!

name: Sarah Miller
review: I stayed here during my backpacking tour of North India. The staff was incredibly welcoming, the bed was comfortable, and it was so easy to meet other students. Highly recommend!
